changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_REVIEW_SCHEDULES START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE REVIEW_SCHEDULES ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, VOCABULARY_WORD_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, EASE_FACTOR NUMBER(4,2) DEFAULT 2.5 NOT NULL, REPETITIONS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, INTERVAL_DAYS NUMBER DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, NEXT_REVIEW_DATE DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE NOT NULL, LAST_REVIEWED_AT TIMESTAMP, CORRECT_COUNT NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, INCORRECT_COUNT NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_REVIEW_SCHEDULES PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_REVIEW_VOCAB FOREIGN KEY (VOCABULARY_WORD_ID) REFERENCES VOCABULARY_WORDS (ID), CONSTRAINT UQ_REVIEW_VOCAB UNIQUE (VOCABULARY_WORD_ID), CONSTRAINT CK_REVIEW_EASE CHECK (EASE_FACTOR >= 1.3), CONSTRAINT CK_REVIEW_REPETITIONS CHECK (REPETITIONS >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_REVIEW_INTERVAL CHECK (INTERVAL_DAYS >= 1), CONSTRAINT CK_REVIEW_CORRECT CHECK (CORRECT_COUNT >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_REVIEW_INCORRECT CHECK (INCORRECT_COUNT >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_REVIEW_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IDX_REVIEW_NEXT_DATE ON REVIEW_SCHEDULES (NEXT_REVIEW_DATE); CREATE INDEX IDX_REVIEW_ACTIVE_DATE ON REVIEW_SCHEDULES (ACTIVE, NEXT_REVIEW_DATE);
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IDX_REVIEW_NEXT_DATE; DROP INDEX IDX_REVIEW_ACTIVE_DATE;
